docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT REGARDING CURRENT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT KAMPMANN, NICOLE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. BOTH PARTIES SERVED EACH OTHER BY CERTIFIED MAIL, NOT COURT CERTIFIED MAIL. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON CLAIM AND CROSS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KAMPMANN, NICOLE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT TONELLO, DESIREE $3,524.49 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,554.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONELLO, DESIREE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAMPMANN, NICOLE $3,288.93 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,363.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TONELLO, DESIREE AS TO DEFENDANT KAMPMANN, NICOLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,205.06 FILED BY KAMPMANN, NICOLE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TONELLO, DESIREE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
